title: Show Alarm History From the Visu_Alarm Screen
summary: Use the SHOW HISTORY button on the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen to display historical alarm records. The source states that the SHOW HISTORY button shows the last 1500 records.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to view alarm history from the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to perform alarm filtering.
Do not use this procedure to export alarm history.
Do not use this procedure to acknowledge alarms.
Do not use this procedure to clear alarms.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Visu_Alarm screen and use the SHOW HISTORY button to display alarm history.

safety_notes: This source documents an HMI viewing action only.
Do not assume any additional alarm-history handling functions beyond displaying the last 1500 records.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Operator Station HMI

access_required: Access to the Operator Station HMI
system_preconditions: The Operator Station HMI is available.
external_references: Figure 4-28 Operator Station HMI Alarms Screen

visual_references.description: Operator Station HMI VISU_ALARM screen showing tipper alarms and timestamps; supports locating the SHOW HISTORY function and confirming alarm display context.
Operator station display controls showing screen-navigation buttons, including F6 mapped to Visu_Alarm.

steps.title: Access the Visu_Alarm screen
steps.purpose: Reach the Operator Station HMI screen where alarm history can be displayed.
steps.instruction: Access the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen.
steps.expected_result: The Visu_Alarm screen is displayed on the Operator Station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows the Visu_Alarm view with tipper alarms and timestamps.
steps.failure_condition: The Visu_Alarm screen cannot be reached or the displayed screen is not the alarm screen.

actions.label: Open Visu_Alarm screen
actions.exact_action: Access the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Screen-navigation controls showing access to Visu_Alarm, including F6 mapped to Visu_Alarm.
The VISU_ALARM screen layout showing tipper alarms and timestamps.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Visu_Alarm screen cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Visu_Alarm screen displays a list of all tipper alarms along with a timestamp.
The listed control mapping includes F6 to "Visu_Alarm."
The Visu_Alarm screen is an Operator Station HMI screen for viewing tipper alarms.

steps.title: Locate the SHOW HISTORY button
steps.purpose: Identify the control used to display historical alarm records.
steps.instruction: Locate the SHOW HISTORY button on the Visu_Alarm screen.
steps.expected_result: The SHOW HISTORY button is visible and ready to be selected.
steps.healthy_condition: The SHOW HISTORY button is present on the Visu_Alarm screen.
steps.failure_condition: The SHOW HISTORY button is not visible on the Visu_Alarm screen.

actions.label: Find SHOW HISTORY button
actions.exact_action: Locate the SHOW HISTORY button on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The SHOW HISTORY button on the Visu_Alarm screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the SHOW HISTORY button is not present on the Visu_Alarm screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The SHOW HISTORY button will show the last 1500 records.

steps.title: Press SHOW HISTORY
steps.purpose: Trigger display of historical alarm records from the Visu_Alarm screen.
steps.expected_result: The HMI updates to show alarm history records.
steps.healthy_condition: Alarm history records are displayed after the button is pressed.
steps.failure_condition: Pressing SHOW HISTORY does not display alarm history records.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The SHOW HISTORY button on the VISU_ALARM screen before selection.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if pressing SHOW HISTORY does not display alarm history records as documented.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The SHOW HISTORY button will show the last 1500 records.

steps.title: Verify alarm history is displayed
steps.purpose: Confirm that the requested alarm history view is shown and matches the documented behavior.
steps.instruction: Verify that the screen shows alarm history records, with the documented history limited to the last 1500 records.
steps.expected_result: The Visu_Alarm screen displays alarm history records representing the last 1500 records.
steps.healthy_condition: Alarm history is visible and matches the documented behavior of showing the last 1500 records.
steps.failure_condition: Alarm history is not shown, or the displayed result does not match the documented behavior.

actions.label: Confirm alarm history display
actions.exact_action: Verify that the screen shows alarm history records, with the documented history limited to the last 1500 records.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Alarm entries and timestamps on the VISU_ALARM screen as the reference view for alarm display.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if alarm history records are not displayed.
Escalate if the displayed behavior does not align with the documented statement that SHOW HISTORY shows the last 1500 records.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The SHOW HISTORY button will show the last 1500 records.
The Visu_Alarm screen displays a list of all tipper alarms along with a timestamp.

success_criteria: The operator reaches the Visu_Alarm screen.
The SHOW HISTORY button is located and used.
The displayed history corresponds to the last 1500 records as documented.
healthy_conditions: The Visu_Alarm screen displays tipper alarms with timestamps.
The SHOW HISTORY button is available on the Visu_Alarm screen.
Using SHOW HISTORY displays the last 1500 records.
failure_conditions: The Visu_Alarm screen cannot be accessed.
The SHOW HISTORY button cannot be found on the Visu_Alarm screen.
Pressing SHOW HISTORY does not display alarm history records.
The source does not support any additional alarm-history functions beyond displaying records.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if pressing SHOW HISTORY does not display alarm history records as documented.
Escalate if the Visu_Alarm screen or SHOW HISTORY button is unavailable.
Do not assume filtering, export, acknowledgement, or clearing functions because they are not described in this source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_ALARM screen showing tipper alarms, timestamps, and the context for the SHOW HISTORY function.
Operator station display controls showing navigation to the Visu_Alarm screen.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The SHOW HISTORY button will show the last 1500 records.
The "Visu_Alarm" screen displays a list of all tipper alarms along with a timestamp.

missing_details: The source does not provide a detailed navigation sequence beyond identifying the Visu_Alarm screen and related display controls.
The source does not specify whether login is required to view alarm history.
The source does not describe filtering, sorting, exporting, acknowledging, or clearing alarm history.
The source does not provide a time estimate for this procedure.
The source does not state whether production must be stopped or whether LOTO is required.
